title: Income Tax Dept Advisory: Ignore Incorrect Advance Tax e-Campaign Emails for AY 2026-27!
content:
# Income Tax Dept Advisory: Ignore Incorrect Advance Tax e-Campaign Emails for AY 2026-27!

Ek important update hai taxpayers ke liye! Income Tax Department ne recently ek advisory jaari ki hai jismein taxpayers ko Advance Tax e-Campaign for Assessment Year 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26) ke तहत aaye kuch emails ko ignore karne ko kaha gaya hai.

Department ne acknowledge kiya hai ki in emails mein "significant transactions" ke baare mein inaccurate details the, jiske karan taxpayers ko inconvenience hui hai.

Here’s what you need to know:
*   **The Issue:** Taxpayers ko Advance Tax e-Campaign (AY 2026-27 / FY 2025-26) ke under aise emails mile hain jinme 'significant transactions' ki galat jaankari thi.
*   **Department's Stance:** Income Tax Department ne is error ko accept kiya hai aur inconvenience ke liye regret express kiya hai. They are actively working with their service provider to resolve this issue.
*   **Taxpayer's Action:** Department ne advise kiya hai ki aap in earlier email communications ko ignore karein. Saath hi, apni transaction details verify karne ke liye Income Tax e-filing website par Compliance Portal ke 'e-Campaign' tab ka use karein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 15 March 2026*
